docket_entries.description: NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2019 NAME CHANGE CALENDAR BY PETITIONER ANGELA MARIE DUFFEK - DENIED. WORKPLACE VIOLENCE RESTRAINING ORDER ISSUED AGAINST MS.
